text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm feeling pretty good today. I think I can handle
even more weight than usual!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Ugh, I'm kinda out of it. Maybe I should get
some fresh air...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ah, what a nice breeze. It's nice and quiet, and
the sun feels nice...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Listen to those birds, singing like they've not a
care in the world...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I just can't be bothered today. Guess I'll sleep.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian soaks in the tranquil atmosphere and
skips training.
